description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a triangular delta wing configuration and a predominantly black and orange color scheme. The wings are sharply swept back, with prominent, integrated weapon-like structures extending forward from each side. The central fuselage is compact, with a blue-tinted cockpit canopy set forward and a visible nuclear warning symbol on the upper surface. The rear section includes exposed mechanical components and what appear to be cooling elements, as well as a blue exhaust or thruster at the back. The surface is adorned with warning labels and technical markings, giving it a high-tech, possibly military or sci-fi appearance.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with delta wings, forward-mounted weapon-like structures, and a blue-tinted cockpit canopy, finished in black and orange with technical markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the triangular delta wing shape, forward-projecting weapon-like structures, and the blue cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low profile, the 'COOLANT' label, and the exposed mechanical components on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue exhaust or thruster, rear warning markings, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular wing, mechanical details, and the cockpit's placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with integrated forward extensions; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine, visible as a blue exhaust at the back.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; features a tailless delta configuration with no vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible in any view.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
